text: Importance of Nutrition Proper nutrition supports muscle growth, fat loss, recovery, and overall health. Weight Loss Diet Plan  Breakfast: Oatmeal, egg whites, green tea  Lunch: Grilled chicken, brown rice, vegetables  Dinner: Vegetable soup and salad Muscle Gain Diet Plan  Breakfast: Eggs, peanut butter sandwich, banana smoothie  Lunch: Chicken breast, rice, broccoli  Dinner: Sweet potato and grilled chicken

Gym Equipment Guide Gym equipment helps target specific muscle groups and improve fitness. Cardio Machines  Treadmill – running and walking workouts  Stationary Bike – low impact cardio  Elliptical Trainer – full body cardio Strength Equipment  Bench Press – chest and triceps  Lat Pulldown – back muscles  Leg Press – lower body strength  Dumbbells – versatile strength training

Gym Rules and Regulations Members must follow gym policies to maintain safety and discipline.  Carry membership card while entering  Wear proper workout clothing  Wipe equipment after use  Return weights to racks Safety Guidelines  Consult trainers before heavy exercises  Use spotters during heavy lifts  Warm up before starting workouts Prohibited Activities  Smoking inside gym premises  Use of steroids or illegal substances  Misuse of gym equipment
